---
title: "Northwestern Symposium on Law + Computation"
description: "Symposium on Law + Computation: An Algorithm for the Rule of Law and Justice?"
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-02-05"
categories: [AI, law, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Northwestern Law + Computation Symposium. Image from [JTIP Symposium, Northwestern](https://jtipsymposiumnorthwestern.com).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Today - Symposium on Law + Computation: An Algorithm for the Rule of Law and Justice?

Co-organized by the Northwestern Law and Technology Initiative and the Northwestern Journal of Technology and Intellectual Property.

<https://jtipsymposiumnorthwestern.com>

Thank you Professor Daniel W. Linna Jr. for organizing the symposium!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_ai-law-activity-6763482728630493184-O25Q).*
